description: Colophon of a codex, probably a Bible. Yosef b. Yaʿqov b. Yosef b. Shemarya b. Menahem (the latter three were all judges) buys the codex on 16 Ḥeshvan 4897 AM = 13 October 1136 CE, "the day on which the prisoners of Jerba arrived." Cf. T-S 10J15.26 (PGPID 2866). (Information mainly from Goitein's index card.) There is further writing that is difficult to read at the bottom of the page at an angle to the main text.
description_he: קולופון של קודקס, כנראה מקרא; יוסף בן יעקב רכש אותו ב-16 לחשוון 4897 לבריאה = 13 באוקטובר 1136 לספירה, ביום שבו הגיעו שבויי ג'רבה
